heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 796l Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this part $33,317,000 for fiscal year 2015, $35,890,000 for fiscal year 2016, $36,635,000 for fiscal year 2017, $37,448,000 for fiscal year 2018, $38,328,000 for fiscal year 2019, and $39,141,000 for fiscal year 2020.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 796, , as added , , , authorized appropriations, prior to the general amendment of this subchapter by .lPub. L. 93–112, title VII, § 753Pub. L. 102–569, title VII, § 703(a)106 Stat. 4468Pub. L. 105–220Oct. 29, 1992

Amendments2014— substituted “$33,317,000 for fiscal year 2015, $35,890,000 for fiscal year 2016, $36,635,000 for fiscal year 2017, $37,448,000 for fiscal year 2018, $38,328,000 for fiscal year 2019, and $39,141,000 for fiscal year 2020.” for “such sums as may be necessary for each of the fiscal years 1999 through 2003.”Pub. L. 113–128
